stages.concept:
# Unit 082: 접속사 (이유) because, as, since - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 이유를 나타내는 접속사 **because, as, since**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **because** — ~때문에 (가장 강한 이유)

> I stayed home **because** it was raining.
> 비가 오고 있었기 때문에 나는 집에 있었다.

> **Because** she was tired, she went to bed early.
> 그녀는 피곤했기 때문에 일찍 잠자리에 들었다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **as** — ~이므로 (이미 알고 있는 이유)

> **As** it was late, we decided to go home.
> 늦었으므로, 우리는 집에 가기로 했다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **since** — ~이므로 (이미 알고 있는 이유, as와 비슷)

> **Since** you are busy, I'll come back later.
> 네가 바쁘니까, 나중에 다시 올게.

**Q. 다음 세 접속사 중 '이유(원인)'의 성격이 가장 강하고 새로운 정보를 전달할 때 쓰는 것은 무엇일까요?**
1. because ✅
2. as
3. since

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. because는 상대방이 모르는 새로운 이유를 말할 때 자주 쓰고, 뜻도 가장 강해요! 

👩‍🏫 선생님: 세 접속사의 차이:

| 접속사 | 강도 | 특징 |
|------|------|------|
| because | 가장 강함 | 새로운/중요한 이유 |
| as | 보통 | 이미 알려진 이유 |
| since | 보통 | 이미 알려진 이유 |

🧑‍🎓 학생: 셋 다 '~때문에'지만, because가 가장 강한 이유를 나타내는 거군요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 082: 접속사(이유) because, as, since - 연습문제 A

**01.** 빈칸에 Because, Because of 중 알맞은 것을 골라 쓰시오.
(     ) the heavy rain, the game was canceled.
> **정답** Because of

---

**02.** ? she was sick, she stayed home.
> **정답** Because

---

**03.** ? the cold weather, we wore thick jackets.
> **정답** Because of

---

**04.** ? he studied hard, he passed the test.
> **정답** Because (Since/As)

---

**05.** ? the traffic, I was late for school.
> **정답** Because of

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Because of she was tired, she went to bed early.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Because of → Because

---

**07.** Because the rain, we couldn't play outside.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Because → Because of

---

**08.** Because of he was hungry, he ate a lot.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Because of → Because

---

**09.** Because the noise, I couldn't sleep.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Because → Because of

---

**10.** Because of it was hot, we went swimming.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Because of → Because

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
비가 와서 소풍이 취소되었다.
it rained, the picnic was canceled.
> **정답** Because (Since/As)

---

**12.** 추운 날씨 때문에 집에 있었다.
the cold weather, I stayed home.
> **정답** Because of

---

**13.** 그녀가 아팠기 때문에 학교에 가지 못했다.
she was sick, she couldn't go to school.
> **정답** Because (Since/As)

---

**14.** 소음 때문에 집중할 수 없었다.
the noise, I couldn't focus.
> **정답** Because of

---

**15.** 늦게 일어났기 때문에 버스를 놓쳤다.
I got up late, I missed the bus.
> **정답** Because (Since/As)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
비가 왔기 때문에 우산을 가져갔다.
Because rained it I took an umbrella
> **정답** Because / it / rained / I / took / an / umbrella

---

**17.** 감기 때문에 학교에 가지 못했다.
Because of a cold I couldn't to go school
> **정답** Because / of / a / cold / I / couldn't / go / to / school

---

**18.** 그가 도와주었기 때문에 일을 끝낼 수 있었다.
Since helped he me I could finish the work
> **정답** Since / he / helped / me / I / could / finish / the / work

---

**19.** 더운 날씨 때문에 밖에 나가지 않았다.
Because of the hot weather we didn't go outside
> **정답** Because / of / the / hot / weather / we / didn't / go / outside

---

**20.** 배가 고팠기 때문에 빵을 두 개 먹었다.
As was I hungry I ate two pieces of bread
> **정답** As / I / was / hungry / I / ate / two / pieces / of / bread
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 082: 접속사(이유) because, as, since - 연습문제 B

**01.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 접속사를
고르시오.
A: Why is he good at writing?
B: _________ he reads many books.
While
As soon as
When
Because
> **정답** Because

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy knows many countries __________ she travels
a lot.
if
through
since
while
> **정답** since

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 바르게 해석한 것을 고르시오.
As he forgot his password, he couldn't log in.
그가 로그인을 할 수 없기 때문에 비밀번호를 잊어버렸
다.
그는 비밀번호을 잊은 동안 로그인을 할 수 없다.
그는 비밀번호를 잊었지만, 로그인을 할 수 있었다.
그는 비밀번호를 잊어버렸기 때문에 로그인을 할 수 없
었다.
> **정답** 그는 비밀번호를 잊어버렸기 때문에 로그인을 할 수 없었다.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He wasn't home when they came over to his
house.
Since I am very busy, I couldn't answer the
phone.
My mother scolded him because he broke the
vase.
They were kicked out of the library as they
were so noisy.
> **정답** Since I am very busy, I couldn't answer the phone.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
Our town changed a lot as time went by.
She went to the hospital as she hurt her hand.
I'm full as I ate too much.
I went to bed early as I was tired.
> **정답** Our town changed a lot as time went by.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
Since I was ten years old, I have lived in
America.
Since birds have wings, they can fly.
Since she was very wise, she solved the
problem
Since we were bored, we played soccer
outside
> **정답** Since I was ten years old, I have lived in America.

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
It rained __________ he left home.
She has a healthy body __________ she exercises
every day.
as
though
until
if
> **정답** as

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ it rained, the flowers has begun to bloom.
_______ he's in class, he can't answer the phone.
when
Since
If
And
> **정답** Since

---

**09.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 순서대로 알맞게 연결한 것을
고르시오.
He passed the exam _______ he studied hard.
The team practiced hard _______ lost the game.
as - but
so - until
since - or
because - so
> **정답** as - but

---

**10.** 다음 문장을 바르게 해석한 것을 고르시오.
He studies hard as he wants to go to college.
그는 열심히 공부했기 때문에 대학에 가고 싶다.
그는 대학에 가고 싶기 때문에 열심히 공부한다.
그는 열심히 공부해서 대학에 간다.
그는 열심히 공부하고 대학에 가기를 원한다.
> **정답** 그는 대학에 가고 싶기 때문에 열심히 공부한다.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 어색한 것을 고르시오.
She was very disappointed __________ she lost her
favorite necklace.
as
since
so
because
> **정답** so

---

**12.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I don't know who she is as I've never met her.
As Tom opened the door, he saw a small
kitty in front of the house.
The class started as I arrived at school.
There were a lot of people as I entered the
concert hall.
> **정답** I don't know who she is as I've never met her.

---

**13.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 다른 것을 고르시오.
Many people attended the lecture since it was
very interesting.
Since he is very healthy, he doesn't catch a
cold very often.
He has been my best friend since I met him in
elementary school.
We will have a meeting since we have a
presentation tomorrow.
• lecture 강의
> **정답** He has been my best friend since I met him in elementary school.

---

**14.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 순서대로 알맞게 연결한 것을
고르시오.
He sat in the front seat _______ he has poor eyesight.
She listened to a song _______ she was walking on
the street.
because - while
as - as soon as
so - because
until - since
> **정답** because - while

---

**15.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
_______ she is good with her hands, she makes things
herself.
While
As
So
Since
> **정답** As, Since

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
날씨가 흐려서 Amy는 우산을 준비했다.
Amy prepared an umbrella and it was
cloudy.
It was cloudy, so Amy prepared an
umbrella.
It was cloudy, because Amy prepared an
umbrella.
Amy prepared an umbrella because it was
cloudy.
> **정답** Amy prepared an umbrella because it was cloudy., It was cloudy, so Amy prepared an umbrella.

---

**17.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
그녀는 그를 믿기 때문에 그를 의심하지 않는다.
She doesn't doubt him and she believes him.
She believes him, as she doesn't doubt him.
She doesn't doubt him as she believes him.
She doesn't doubt him because she believes
him.
> **정답** She doesn't doubt him because she believes him., She doesn't doubt him as she believes him.

---

**18.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
그는 가난했기 때문에 돈을 절약했다.
He was poor, as he saved money.
He was poor, since he saved money.
He saved money because he was poor.
He saved money since he was poor.
> **정답** He saved money because he was poor., He saved money since he was poor.

---

**19.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She is afraid of dogs _______ she thinks a dog might
bite her.
so
while
because
and
> **정답** because

---

**20.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 수 없는 말을 고르시오.
I couldn't read it __________ the menu was written in
English.
since
as
so
because
> **정답** so
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 082 접속사(이유) because, as, since중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 보기에서 알맞은 접속사를 선택하여 문장을 완성하시오.
[When, As, While]
그녀는 그녀의 일을 잘 몰랐기 때문에 조언이 필요했다.
 she didn't know much about her work, she
needed advice.
정답 As

---

**02.** 보기에서 알맞은 접속사를 선택하여 문장을 완성하시오.
[when, until, because]
그는 독서를 하고 싶어서 도서관에 갔다.
He went to the library  (     )  he wanted to read
books.
정답 because

---

**03.** 보기에서 알맞은 접속사를 선택하여 문장을 완성하시오.
[since, and, while]
너무 덥기 때문에 그는 매우 지쳤다.
He was very tired  (     )  it was so hot.
정답 since

---

**04.** 주어진 두 문장을 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 접속사
because를 사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
I can sing well.
I want to be a singer.
나는 노래를 잘하기 때문에 가수가 되고 싶다.
정답 I want to be a singer because I can sing well.
(Because I can sing well, I want to be a singer.)

---

**05.** 주어진 두 문장을 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 접속사 as를
사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
She came to the playground with her parents.
She was young.
그녀는 어리기 때문에 부모와 함께 놀이터에 왔다.
정답 She came to the playground with her parents as she
was young. (As she was young, she came to the
playground with her parents.)

---

**06.** 주어진 두 문장을 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 접속사 since를
사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
I set a goal
I wanted to succeed.
나는 성공하고 싶어서 목표를 세웠다.
정답 I set a goal since I wanted to succeed. (Since I wanted to succeed, I set a goal.)
wanted to succeed, I set a goal.)

---

**07.** 주어진 접속사 중 하나를 사용하여 대화문을 완성하시오.
[because, until, after]
A: Why did he come back home?
B:  (     )  he had to help his parents.
정답 Because

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
영화가 인기를 얻었기 때문에 감독은 유명해졌다.
힌트 (     ) the movie, because, gained, popularity
The director became famous  (     )   (     )  
  (     ) .
정답 because, the, movie, gained, popularity

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 수업에 늦었기 때문에 택시를 탔다.
힌트 (     ) late, as, was, he, for, class
He took a taxi  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 as, he, was, late, for, class

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그들은 유럽여행을 하고 싶어서 열심히 돈을 모았다.
힌트 (     ) wanted, since, they, to travel, to Europe
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
, they saved money.
정답 Since, they, wanted, to, travel, to, Europe

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 082: 접속사 - 변형문제

**01.** 주어진 대화에서 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
A: Why is she good at drawing?
B: _________ she practices every day.
While As soon as When Because
> 정답: Because

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Tom knows many languages __________ he studies a lot. if through since while
> 정답: since

---

**03.** 다음 문장을 바르게 해석한 것을 고르시오.
As he forgot his wallet, he couldn't pay.
그가 돈을 낼 수 없기 때문에 지갑을 잊어버렸다. 그는 지갑을 잊은 동안 돈을 낼 수 없다. 그는 지갑을 잊었지만, 돈을 낼 수 있었다. 그는 지갑을 잊어버렸기 때문에 돈을 낼 수 없었다.
> 정답: 그는 지갑을 잊어버렸기 때문에 돈을 낼 수 없었다.

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He wasn't home when they came to visit him.
Since I am very busy, I couldn't answer the call.
My teacher praised him because he won the contest.
They were kicked out of the library as they were so loud.
> 정답: Since I am very busy, I couldn't answer the call.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
Our town changed a lot as time passed by.
She went to the clinic as she hurt her leg.
I'm full as I ate too much.
I went to bed early as I was sleepy.
> 정답: Our town changed a lot as time passed by.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 것을 고르시오.
Since I was twelve years old, I have lived in Canada.
Since birds have wings, they can fly.
Since she was very smart, she solved the puzzle.
Since we were bored, we played basketball outside.
> 정답: Since I was twelve years old, I have lived in Canada.

---

**07.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
It snowed __________ he left home.
She has a healthy body __________ she exercises every day. as though until if
> 정답: as

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ it rained, the flowers have begun to bloom.
_______ he's in class, he can't answer the text. when Since If And
> 정답: Since

---

**09.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말을 순서대로 알맞게 연결한 것을 고르시오.
He passed the quiz _______ he studied hard.
The team practiced hard _______ lost the match. as - but so - until since - or because - so
> 정답: as - but

---

**10.** 다음 문장을 바르게 해석한 것을 고르시오.
He studies hard as he wants to be a doctor.
그는 열심히 공부했기 때문에 의사가 되고 싶다. 그는 의사가 되고 싶기 때문에 열심히 공부한다. 그는 열심히 공부해서 의사가 된다. 그는 열심히 공부하고 의사가 되기를 원한다.
> 정답: 그는 의사가 되고 싶기 때문에 열심히 공부한다.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 어색한 것을 고르시오.
She was very upset __________ she lost her favorite bracelet. as since so because
> 정답: so

---

**12.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분의 뜻이 다른 것을 고르시오.
I don't know who he is as I've never met him.
As Tom opened the gate, he saw a small puppy in front of the yard.
The lesson started as I arrived at class.
